# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

No implementation files were modified in this diff; only metadata in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json` changed. Since there are no source-code or behavioral changes to audit, there are no correctness, safety, or robustness defects to flag for this review pass. Residual risk: no functional logic was changed, so this review cannot validate runtime behavior deltas in this cycle.

## Amendments

None.
